zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut於0960年1月6日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，他的父親Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes35歲，母親Judith de Cambrai40歲。他與Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1002年11月30日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut于0960年1月6日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯时，他的父亲Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes35岁，母亲Judith de Cambrai40岁。他与Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1002年11月30日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut was born on 6 January 0960, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes, was 35 and his mother, Judith de Cambrai, was 40. He married Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 November 1002, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut est né le 6 janvier 0960, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Judith de Cambrai, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1002, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut am 6. Januar 0960 in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes 35 und seine Mutter Judith de Cambrai 40. Er hat in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. November 1002 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut è nato il il 6 gennaio 0960 nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Cambrai, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 novembre 1002, nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Montfort-Hainautが0960年1月6日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスで生まれた時，父Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennesは35歳，母Judith de Cambraiは40歳であった。フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスでAlbreda d'Esperon de Nogentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1002年11月30日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut(이)가 0960년 1월 6일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Cambrai(은)는 40세였다. 그는 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1002년 11월 30일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.6 January 960–30 November 1002: 0960 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6–1002 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 30

pt.6 January 960–30 November 1002: 6 de janeiro de 0960–30 de novembro de 1002
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 0960, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Cambrai, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1002, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut родился 6 января 0960 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Cambrai, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 ноября 1002 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.6 January 960–30 November 1002: 6 de enero de 0960–30 de noviembre de 1002
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut nació el 6 de enero de 0960, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Amaury de Hainaut comte de Valenciennes, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Judith de Cambrai, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1002, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
